scripts.build: node --input-type=module --eval "import * as esbuild from 'esbuild'; await esbuild.build({ entryPoints: ['src/index.ts'], outfile: 'dist/promo-engine.js', bundle: true, minify: true, platform: 'browser', format: 'iife', globalName: 'PromoEngine' })"
scripts.build:dev: node --input-type=module --eval "import * as esbuild from 'esbuild'; await esbuild.build({ entryPoints: ['src/index.ts'], outfile: 'dist/promo-engine.dev.js', bundle: true, platform: 'browser', format: 'iife', globalName: 'PromoEngine', sourcemap: true })"
